title: crassula alpina
intro: Crassula alpina, also known as the Mountain Crassula or Alpine Crassula, is a succulent plant species native to the high-altitude regions of South Africa. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Crassula alpina include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or capsules, or used topically in creams and ointments.
